resources.string: Are you sure you want to delete this account? All data will be lost.
Incorrect password for %1$s. Would you like to reset this account? This will delete all its data.
💧 A quick sip to keep you going.
Are you sure you want to clear all history? This cannot be undone.
🌱 Great start! ¼ of the way there!
Please enter the limit recommended by your doctor:
Automatic calculations may be unsafe for your condition.
🫀 Your heart is 73% water — staying hydrated helps maintain healthy blood pressure.
🦠 The water you drink contains atoms that passed through dinosaurs — Earth\'s water is 4.5 billion years old!
🔬 Even mild dehydration (1–3%) can impair your mood and concentration.
🧊 Hot water can freeze faster than cold — called the Mpemba Effect, and scientists still aren\'t totally sure why!
💪 Drinking water boosts metabolism by 24–30% for 1–1.5 hours.
🌊 A black hole 12 billion light-years away holds 140 trillion times more water than all of Earth\'s oceans!
🧠 The human body is about 60% water for men, 55% for women.
💧 Water is the only natural substance found as liquid, gas, and solid on Earth — and ice floats because it\'s less dense!
❤️ Proper hydration reduces the risk of kidney stones by up to 50%.
🧠 Your brain has no water reserves — even 2% dehydration can temporarily shrink brain tissue!
⚡ Your nerves and heart both use electricity — water helps conduct the signals that keep them firing!
🌍 97% of Earth\'s water is salty, 2% is locked in ice — only 1% is accessible freshwater for 8 billion people!
😴 Dehydration disrupts sleep by reducing melatonin production and causing nighttime muscle cramps.
🔥 Water expands 9% when frozen — that\'s how pipes burst and mountains are slowly carved apart!
🌡️ Water helps regulate body temperature through sweating and respiration.
🌌 A single cloud near the center of our galaxy holds enough water vapor to fill Earth\'s oceans 2,000 times!
🫁 Your lungs are about 83% water. Stay hydrated for better breathing!
🌱 Plants \"talk\" through water — when attacked, they release chemical signals through vapor that warn neighbors!
🦴 Even bones are 31% water. Hydration affects joint lubrication too.
🎵 Sound travels 4x faster through water — that\'s how whales communicate across entire oceans!
💧 You lose about 1–1.5 liters of water daily just through breathing and skin.
🔄 Water helps flush out 400 billion old blood cells daily while transporting nutrients to make new ones!
🔬 Drinking 500ml of water increases metabolic rate by 30% within 10 minutes.
🌡️ Oceans act as Earth\'s heat battery — water resists temperature changes more than anything else!
🧠 Thirst signals are often mistaken for hunger - try water first!
👀 Your eyeballs are 95% water — they need constant moisture to maintain shape and focus light!
🦠 Pure water droplets can stay liquid at -40°C — impurities trigger freezing!
⚡ Water can glow — ultrasonic vibrations create tiny flashes of light called sonoluminescence!
💧 Water molecules are so cohesive that a column of water only 1 cm wide could lift a car!
🧬 Water is the \"universal solvent\" — it dissolves more substances than any other liquid!
⚡ Water conducts electricity - it\'s essential for your heart\'s rhythm!
🏔️ There\'s water 400 miles underground — trapped in rock, holding 3x more than all surface oceans combined!
🌡️ Your body loses more water at high altitudes and in dry climates.
🦠 Your gut produces 1–3 pints of water daily through chemical reactions — recycling water inside you!
💧 By the time you feel thirsty, you\'re already mildly de-hydrated.
🎨 Pure water is actually pale blue — not clear! It absorbs red light, giving oceans their blue tint!
🔬 Water makes up 75% of your brain cells - hydrate for mental clarity!
🫧 Water molecules form fleeting networks that last only picoseconds — a millionth of a millionth of a second!
🧴 Your skin elasticity depends on proper hydration - drink for healthy glow!
🌡️ Water has an unusually high boiling point — without this property, oceans would evaporate instantly!
Goal updated to %1$d ml. Current intake: %2$d ml.
